assignments.name: Add_Input_Duplicate_Id_to_List
assignments.label: Add Input Duplicate Id to List

assignments.name: Assign_Count_Get_Award_OS_Records
assignments.label: Assign Count Get Award OS Records

assignments.name: Assign_Final_Address_Matched_Status_to_List
assignments.label: Assign Final Address Matched Status to List

Flow.description: Screenflow to allow users to accept results from OS Matching process
Flow.label: DESNZ - OS Match Manager

loops.name: Loop_Award_OS_Candidate_Address_Records
loops.label: Loop Award OS Candidate Address Records

fields.name: Approve_Partial_Match_Help
fields.fieldText: The following addresses have been partially matched with the Ordnance Survey Match and Cleanse Service. Please review and select any addresses that you wish to use. By making selection the system will be using the UPRN returned by OS for matching to Trustmark.

fields.name: Check_Matched_Addresses_Help
fields.fieldText:
The following addresses have been matched with the Ordnance Survey Match and Cleanse Service and have been automatically pre-selected.

﻿Please deselect any addresses that you do not consider a match and should be rejected.

fields.name: List_Non_Matches_Help
fields.fieldText: The following addresses have not been matched with the Ordnance Survey Match and Cleanse Service and therefore no UPRN is available to match with the TrustMark Data service. In order to modify an address please renter a valid address to obtain an address with a UPRN. Any addresses that do not have a match will be rejected.

fields.name: Matched_Summary_Text
fields.fieldText: The unmatched/deselected records are listed below and will be set to a status of rejected unless the checkbox is cleared

fields.name: Match_Count_Text
fields.fieldText:
Still Searching...

Please Press Button Below


OS matching takes a little time. Please wait a few moments and then press refresh. If the count has not yet reached the total please press refresh again and repeat every few moments until the results table appears.
